← all 383 games

Weird Games

This is the strange shelf: a lab game that narrates exactly how it is manipulating you while it does it, a button whose entire game is that you should not press it, autoplay you have to fight. Small internet experiments that are one-part game, one-part joke, one-part mirror. Show a friend.

VIRAL

Lab Rat

you are the subject

outlast the experiment
VIRAL

DON'T PRESS

a button that says DO NOT PRESS

get to 100

Questions

What are some weird websites with games?

You are on one. This page collects our strangest browser experiments — self-aware games, anti-games and curiosities — all free and instant.

More collections

Games to Play When Bored 1-Minute Games Calming Games Games That Feel Good When You’re Anxious Games to Play in Bed When You Can’t Sleep Fidget Games Oddly Satisfying Games Sensory Games Memory Test Games Reaction Time Games Rhythm Games Face-Controlled Games Precision Games Games to Challenge Your Friends
